incidents.title: Noise complaint from neighbouring flat
incidents.description: Caller reports loud music coming from a neighbouring flat. No shouting, threats or violence reported.

incidents.title: Road traffic collision with injury
incidents.description: Caller reports two vehicles have collided at a junction. One driver is complaining of neck pain and traffic is building.

incidents.title: Historic theft of mobile phone
incidents.description: Caller says their mobile phone was stolen from a cafe table earlier in the day. The suspect is no longer present.

incidents.title: Domestic argument heard next door
incidents.description: Caller can hear shouting and banging from the neighbouring property. A woman has been heard crying.

incidents.title: Shoplifting suspect detained
incidents.description: Store security have detained a person suspected of stealing items. The suspect is calm and waiting with security.

incidents.title: Abandoned vehicle report
incidents.description: Caller reports a vehicle has been parked outside their home for three weeks and has not moved.

incidents.title: Elderly person missing from home
incidents.description: Caller reports their 82-year-old father, who has dementia, left home alone and has not returned.

incidents.title: Criminal damage to garden fence
incidents.description: Caller reports their garden fence was damaged overnight. No suspect has been seen.

incidents.title: Argument outside takeaway
incidents.description: Two males are arguing outside a takeaway. No weapons have been seen and no physical violence has been reported.

incidents.title: Child left alone in car
incidents.description: Caller reports a young child crying inside a parked car. No adult is visible nearby.

incidents.title: Lost bank card report
incidents.description: Caller has lost their bank card and wants to report it to police. No theft is alleged.

incidents.title: Neighbour dispute about parking
incidents.description: Caller says their neighbour has parked across their driveway. No threats or violence have been reported.

incidents.title: Burglary in progress
incidents.description: Caller can see two people forcing open the rear door of a neighbour’s house.

incidents.title: Historic harassment messages
incidents.description: Caller reports receiving repeated unwanted messages from an ex-partner over the past week. No threats have been made today.

incidents.title: Drunk person asleep at bus stop
incidents.description: Caller reports a heavily intoxicated person asleep at a bus stop. They are breathing but difficult to wake.

incidents.title: Theft from vehicle
incidents.description: Caller reports tools were stolen from their van overnight. No suspect is present.

incidents.title: Youths throwing stones at buses
incidents.description: Caller reports a group of youths throwing stones at passing buses. One bus window has cracked.

incidents.title: Dog fouling complaint
incidents.description: Caller wants to report repeated dog fouling outside their property.

incidents.title: Fight outside a shop
incidents.description: Caller reports two males fighting outside a local shop. One has fallen to the ground.

incidents.title: Stolen bicycle
incidents.description: Caller reports their bicycle was stolen from outside a train station earlier today.

incidents.title: Loud party complaint
incidents.description: Caller reports loud music and shouting from a nearby house party. No violence has been reported.

incidents.title: Suspicious person near vehicles
incidents.description: Caller reports a person trying car door handles along the street.

incidents.title: Lost passport
incidents.description: Caller has lost their passport and wants a police reference number.

incidents.title: Minor neighbour argument
incidents.description: Caller says their neighbour shouted at them over a boundary issue. No threats were made.

incidents.title: Missing 10-year-old child
incidents.description: Caller reports their 10-year-old child has not returned home from school and cannot be contacted.

incidents.title: Vehicle blocking driveway
incidents.description: Caller reports an unknown vehicle is blocking their driveway.

incidents.title: Assault reported after event
incidents.description: Caller says they were punched outside a bar last night. They are now at home and do not need medical help.

incidents.title: Person threatening self-harm
incidents.description: Caller reports their friend has sent messages saying they want to end their life and is not answering calls.

incidents.title: Graffiti on wall
incidents.description: Caller reports graffiti has appeared on the side wall of their business.

incidents.title: Group drinking in park
incidents.description: Caller reports a group drinking alcohol in the park and being loud. No threats or violence have been reported.

incidents.title: Domestic incident with child present
incidents.description: Caller says her partner is shouting, throwing items and refusing to let her leave. Their child is upstairs.

incidents.title: Historic online fraud
incidents.description: Caller transferred money to someone online and believes it was a scam.

incidents.title: Shoplifter left store
incidents.description: Shop staff report a person stole alcohol and left the shop. No staff were threatened.

incidents.title: Road obstruction
incidents.description: A fallen tree is blocking one lane of a main road. Vehicles are swerving around it.

incidents.title: Suspicious package at station
incidents.description: Caller reports an unattended bag on a train platform. Staff are aware but unsure who it belongs to.

incidents.title: Ongoing neighbour noise
incidents.description: Caller says their neighbour plays loud music most evenings. No threats or violence have been reported.

incidents.title: Robbery just occurred
incidents.description: Caller says their phone was taken by two males who threatened them. The suspects ran towards the high street.

incidents.title: Abandoned shopping trolley
incidents.description: Caller reports a shopping trolley has been left on the pavement outside their home.

incidents.title: Elderly neighbour not seen
incidents.description: Caller has not seen their elderly neighbour for two days. Curtains are closed and milk is outside the door.

incidents.title: Teenagers knocking on doors
incidents.description: Caller reports teenagers knocking on doors and running away. No damage has been caused.

incidents.title: Car collision with no injury
incidents.description: Two cars have collided at low speed. Drivers are exchanging details but one is becoming angry.

incidents.title: Historic burglary report
incidents.description: Caller returned from holiday and found their home had been burgled. The suspect is not present.

incidents.title: Suspected drink driver
incidents.description: Caller reports a vehicle swerving across lanes. The driver appears unable to control the car.

incidents.title: Ex-partner sending repeated texts
incidents.description: Caller says their ex-partner has sent 30 unwanted messages today. No direct threats have been made.

incidents.title: Theft of parcel
incidents.description: Caller reports a parcel was stolen from outside their front door.

incidents.title: Fight has ended
incidents.description: Caller reports a fight outside a pub has now ended. One person has a cut lip but both parties have left.

incidents.title: Child crying in street
incidents.description: Caller reports a young child alone in the street crying and unable to explain where they live.

incidents.title: Damage to wing mirror
incidents.description: Caller found their car wing mirror damaged and believes it happened overnight.

incidents.title: Woman followed from bus stop
incidents.description: Caller says a man followed her from the bus stop and is now waiting outside her building.

incidents.title: Dispute over taxi fare
incidents.description: Taxi driver reports a passenger refusing to pay. The passenger is calm but will not leave the vehicle.

incidents.title: Shed broken into
incidents.description: Caller reports their shed was broken into and gardening tools were stolen.

incidents.title: Group fighting with bottles
incidents.description: Caller reports several people fighting outside a bar. Bottles are being thrown.

incidents.title: Fraudulent bank transaction
incidents.description: Caller has noticed an unknown transaction on their bank account and believes it is fraud.

incidents.title: Car alarm sounding
incidents.description: Caller reports a car alarm has been sounding for 20 minutes. No one has been seen near the vehicle.

incidents.title: Breach of restraining order
incidents.description: Caller says their ex-partner, who is subject to a restraining order, is outside their address shouting.

incidents.title: Attempted theft from shop
incidents.description: Staff challenged a suspect who tried to steal items. The suspect left without the goods.

incidents.title: Missing teenager
incidents.description: Parent reports their 15-year-old has not returned home and has missed curfew. This has happened before.

incidents.title: Motorbike speeding through estate
incidents.description: Caller reports a motorbike repeatedly riding at speed through a residential estate.

incidents.title: Wallet stolen in cafe
incidents.description: Caller reports their wallet was taken from their bag while they were in a cafe.

incidents.title: Neighbour threatening to damage car
incidents.description: Caller says their neighbour has threatened to smash their car window during an argument.

incidents.title: Caller trapped in bathroom
incidents.description: Caller says their partner is outside the bathroom door shouting threats and refusing to let them leave.

incidents.title: Historic criminal damage
incidents.description: Caller reports their front window was cracked overnight. No suspect has been seen.

incidents.title: Suspicious male near school gates
incidents.description: Caller reports a male standing near school gates watching children. No direct approach has been seen.

incidents.title: Person collapsed in street
incidents.description: Caller reports a person has collapsed on the pavement. They are breathing but not responding clearly.

incidents.title: Car broken into
incidents.description: Caller reports their car window has been smashed and items taken.

incidents.title: Ongoing barking dog complaint
incidents.description: Caller reports a dog has been barking continuously next door. No welfare concerns have been raised.

incidents.title: Man with knife seen in park
incidents.description: Caller reports seeing a man holding what appears to be a knife in a public park. He is walking near other people.

incidents.title: Harassment by neighbour
incidents.description: Caller says their neighbour keeps making rude comments when they pass in the hallway.

incidents.title: Missing elderly person returned home
incidents.description: Caller says their elderly mother went missing earlier but has now returned home safely.

incidents.title: Cyclist injured after collision
incidents.description: Caller reports a cyclist has been hit by a car and is lying in the road.

incidents.title: Suspected drug dealing
incidents.description: Caller reports people exchanging small packages in an alleyway. No violence has been seen.

incidents.title: Dispute over online sale
incidents.description: Caller bought an item online but says the seller has not sent it.

incidents.title: Silent emergency call
incidents.description: Call handler can hear movement and muffled crying, but the caller does not speak. Location information is available.

incidents.title: Youths damaging bus shelter
incidents.description: Caller reports four youths kicking panels at a bus shelter. No one is being threatened.

incidents.title: Historic domestic assault report
incidents.description: Caller says they were assaulted by their partner two days ago. They are now staying with a friend.

incidents.title: Elderly person confused in shop
incidents.description: Shop staff report an elderly person appears confused, cannot remember their address and has no phone.

incidents.title: Lost mobile phone
incidents.description: Caller left their phone on a bus and wants to report it lost.

incidents.title: Threats between neighbours
incidents.description: Caller says their neighbour has threatened to “sort them out” after an argument about noise.

incidents.title: Suspected burglary with occupant inside
incidents.description: Caller is upstairs and believes someone has broken into the house downstairs. They can hear movement.

incidents.title: Shoplifting suspect detained and aggressive
incidents.description: Store security have detained a suspected shoplifter who is now shouting and trying to leave.

incidents.title: Historic theft from workplace
incidents.description: Caller believes money was stolen from their locker at work last week.

incidents.title: Concern for suicidal caller
incidents.description: Caller says they have taken tablets and are alone at home. They are becoming drowsy.

incidents.title: Road rage incident ended
incidents.description: Caller says another driver shouted abuse and followed them for a short distance. The other driver has now left.

incidents.title: Repeated nuisance calls
incidents.description: Caller reports receiving several silent calls from an unknown number over the past two days.

incidents.title: Domestic abuse victim reports suspect has left
incidents.description: Caller says their partner assaulted them 20 minutes ago and has now left. Caller is injured but safe at a neighbour’s address.

incidents.title: Group chasing male in street
incidents.description: Caller reports four males chasing another male down the road. One appears to be carrying a metal pole.

incidents.title: Missing adult not answering phone
incidents.description: Caller reports their adult brother has not answered calls today. No known vulnerabilities have been disclosed.

incidents.title: Burglary discovered after work
incidents.description: Caller returned home to find the front door forced and rooms searched. No one appears to be inside.

incidents.title: Aggressive beggar outside shop
incidents.description: Caller reports a male shouting at customers and blocking the shop doorway. No weapon has been seen.

incidents.title: Child reports parent unconscious
incidents.description: A 9-year-old caller says their parent is on the floor and will not wake up. The child is alone at home.

incidents.title: Caller reports being followed in vehicle
incidents.description: Caller says a car has been following them for several streets. The caller is alone and frightened.

incidents.title: Historic theft from supermarket
incidents.description: Supermarket staff report a person stole items earlier in the day and left before security could stop them.

incidents.title: Concern for elderly resident
incidents.description: Caller says their elderly neighbour has not collected their medication delivery, which is unusual.

incidents.title: Fight reported but parties separated
incidents.description: Caller reports two people were fighting in the street, but they have now separated and walked away.

incidents.title: Man shouting at passing traffic
incidents.description: Caller reports a man standing near the road shouting at passing vehicles. He is stepping close to the kerb.

incidents.title: Lost set of keys
incidents.description: Caller has lost their house keys and wants advice. No theft is alleged.

incidents.title: Caller hears screams from nearby alleyway
incidents.description: Caller can hear a person screaming for help from a nearby alleyway but cannot see what is happening.

incidents.title: Fraudulent online purchase
incidents.description: Caller paid for concert tickets online but has not received them and believes the seller was fake.

incidents.title: Ex-partner waiting outside workplace
incidents.description: Caller says their ex-partner is waiting outside their workplace and has refused to leave. No threats have been made today.

incidents.title: Group blocking shop entrance
incidents.description: Caller reports a group of youths blocking the entrance to a shop and refusing to move. No threats have been made.

incidents.title: Vehicle collision with trapped driver
incidents.description: Caller reports a car has hit a wall and the driver appears unable to get out.

incidents.title: Damage to garden wall
incidents.description: Caller reports their garden wall has been damaged. They believe it happened during the night.

incidents.title: Report of possible domestic assault
incidents.description: Caller says they heard a loud argument next door followed by a woman crying. The property has now gone quiet.

incidents.title: Young child missing in shopping centre
incidents.description: Caller reports their 5-year-old child has gone missing inside a busy shopping centre. Security are searching but have not found them.

incidents.title: Vehicle being driven dangerously near school
incidents.description: Caller reports a car repeatedly speeding past a school entrance while children are leaving.

incidents.title: Historic assault with minor injury
incidents.description: Caller says they were pushed during an argument yesterday and have a bruised arm. They are now at home.

incidents.title: Suspected burglary at empty property
incidents.description: Caller can see a broken window at a neighbour’s empty property. No one is seen inside.

incidents.title: Verbal argument at bus stop
incidents.description: Caller reports two people arguing loudly at a bus stop. No weapons or physical violence have been seen.
